questions: First, I wake up at 7:00 AM. Then, I brush my teeth. Finally, _______________________
First, I wake up at 7:00 AM. Then, I brush my teeth. Finally, I eat breakfast with my family.
First, my mom buys the ingredients. Then, she washes the vegetables. After that, _______________________
First, my mom buys the ingredients. Then, she washes the vegetables. After that, she cooks dinner for us.
First, we arrive at the park. Then, we play soccer with our friends. Finally, _______________________
First, we arrive at the park. Then, we play soccer with our friends. Finally, we go home very tired.
First, open your notebook. Then, write the date at the top. After that, _______________________
First, open your notebook. Then, write the date at the top. After that, copy the exercise from the board.
First, I go to the supermarket. Then, I buy bread and milk. Finally, _______________________
First, I go to the supermarket. Then, I buy bread and milk. Finally, I pay at the cashier.
First, my sister turns on the music. Then, she starts dancing. After that, _______________________
First, my sister turns on the music. Then, she starts dancing. After that, I dance with her.
First, the teacher explains the activity. Then, we work in pairs. Finally, _______________________
First, the teacher explains the activity. Then, we work in pairs. Finally, we share our answers with the class.
First, I take a shower. Then, I put on my school uniform. After that, _______________________
First, I take a shower. Then, I put on my school uniform. After that, I walk to the bus stop.
First, Daniel opens his laptop. Then, he checks his email. Finally, _______________________
First, Daniel opens his laptop. Then, he checks his email. Finally, he starts his homework.
First, we buy the tickets. Then, we find our seats. After that, _______________________
First, we buy the tickets. Then, we find our seats. After that, we watch the movie.
First, I put water in the pot. Then, I wait for the water to boil. After that, _______________________
First, I put water in the pot. Then, I wait for the water to boil. After that, I add the pasta and salt.
First, Camila wakes up early. Then, she goes for a run in the park. Finally, _______________________
First, Camila wakes up early. Then, she goes for a run in the park. Finally, she takes a cold shower.
First, click on the green button. Then, type your username and password. After that, _______________________
First, click on the green button. Then, type your username and password. After that, press 'Enter' to log in.
First, my dad washes the car. Then, my brother helps him with the windows. Finally, _______________________
First, my dad washes the car. Then, my brother helps him with the windows. Finally, they dry the car with a towel.
First, we choose a restaurant. Then, we read the menu carefully. After that, _______________________
First, we choose a restaurant. Then, we read the menu carefully. After that, we order our food and drinks.
First, the dog sees the ball. Then, he runs very fast across the garden. Finally, _______________________
First, the dog sees the ball. Then, he runs very fast across the garden. Finally, he brings the ball back to me.
First, I open my English book. Then, I read the new vocabulary. After that, _______________________
First, I open my English book. Then, I read the new vocabulary. After that, I write five sentences in my notebook.
First, Sofia packs her suitcase. Then, she takes a taxi to the airport. Finally, _______________________
First, Sofia packs her suitcase. Then, she takes a taxi to the airport. Finally, she gets on the plane to Bogotá.
First, we put on our swimsuits. Then, we walk down to the beach. After that, _______________________
First, we put on our swimsuits. Then, we walk down to the beach. After that, we swim in the ocean for two hours.
First, my grandmother turns on the TV. Then, she sits in her favorite chair. Finally, _______________________
First, my grandmother turns on the TV. Then, she sits in her favorite chair. Finally, she falls asleep during the movie.
